title: calophyllum fibrosum
intro: Calophyllum fibrosum, also known as the Kapulaga tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its high content of terpenoids and coumarins. The health benefits of Calophyllum fibrosum include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Calophyllum fibrosum include extracts, oils, and tinctures that can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
